nasb.text: And He *said to them, “How many loaves do you have? Go look!” And when they found out, they *said, “Five, and two fish.”

esv.text: And he said to them, “How many loaves do you have? Go and see.” And when they had found out, they said, “Five, and two fish.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“去看看你們有多少餅！”他們知道了，就說：“五個餅，還有兩條魚。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“看看你们有多少饼。” 他们察看后，说：“有五个饼和两条鱼。”

csbs.text: 耶稣问他们：“你们有多少饼呢？去看看。” 他们察看后，就说：“有五个，还有两条鱼。”
